# Take Me Back Bingo

> Live hip-hop and R&B music bingo nights. The DJ drops 30-second clips
> of throwback hits, players mark song titles on their cards instead of
> numbers, and the first to line up five yells "TAKE ME BACK" to win.
> Three rounds a night, then a dance battle to close. Based in NY/NJ,
> travels nationwide for private bookings. 21+.

Take Me Back Bingo is built by High Class Experience LLC. The brand
sits at the intersection of music bingo, hip-hop and R&B nostalgia,
and live event entertainment, with a distinctive cassette-tape /
mixtape visual identity.

## Upcoming events

- [Take Me Back Bingo: Summer Jam](https://takemebackbingo.com/events#evt-summer-jam-2026): Friday, June 26, 2026 at Lake Chateau Banquets (1002 US-9, Woodbridge Township, NJ 07095). DJ Tameil on the decks. Hosted by Comedian Talent (Def Comedy Jam, BET's Comic View, The Apollo). 80s, 90s, 00s music with dance battles and lip sync battles between rounds. Doors 6 PM. Show 7 PM. After-party 10 PM to 12 AM. Early bird $40. 21+. Tickets: https://www.simpletix.com/e/take-me-back-bingo-summer-jam-tickets-278482

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://takemebackbingo.com/): brand overview, how the night works, the four challenges (dance battles, lip sync wars, sing-alongs), FAQ, and the booking inquiry form
- [Events](https://takemebackbingo.com/events): upcoming nights on sale + past sold-out shows (Thriller Bingo, Reminisce Bingo)
- [Gallery](https://takemebackbingo.com/gallery): crowd shots and winner photos from past nights
- [Play](https://takemebackbingo.com/play): the full Take Me Back Bingo game playable free in any browser. Real song clips from the iTunes catalog, voice-detected wins (yell "TAKE ME BACK"), shareable win cards. Winners unlock a 10% discount code for a real Take Me Back Bingo ticket.

## How a night works

1. Each player gets a unique 5 x 5 bingo card. Every square is a song title pulled from that night's theme (90s R&B, 2000s Hip-Hop, Michael Jackson, 80s Throwbacks, Quiet Storm, Y2K Pop). 60 songs in the pool, 24 on a card, one free space in the middle.
2. The DJ plays 30 to 60 seconds of a track. If the song is on your card, you mark the square.
3. First to a line of five (row, column, diagonal, or four corners) yells "BINGO" (or the night's special call phrase, like "THRILLER"). Host confirms, the room cheers, the round closes.
4. Three rounds a night spread across about three hours, prizes every round (bar tabs, merch, brand samples), then a full dance battle to close.

## Between the rounds

Take Me Back Bingo runs three between-round challenges with their own prizes:
- Dance Battles: two players, one beat, thirty seconds each. The room votes with applause, the host has the tiebreak.
- Lip Sync Wars: one song, one hook, mic in your hand. Best performance takes a bar tab or merch.
- Sing-Alongs: the whole room becomes the chorus. Loudest table on the hook wins shots or an extra prize draw.

## Private bookings

Take Me Back Bingo travels for birthdays, bachelorettes, work crews,
anniversary parties, corporate parties, brand activations, weddings,
and festivals nationwide. Each booking gets a custom playlist tuned
to the crowd, two themed bingo rounds with custom prizes, and host +
DJ + cards + daubers + sound. About three hours, give or take. NY/NJ
based, within ~50 miles of NYC is the standard rate, beyond that we
add travel. 50% deposit holds the date.

To book: use the inquiry form on the homepage footer, email
info@takemebackbingo.com, or text 732.646.7073.

## Founders

DJs, hype people, and music nerds who started Take Me Back Bingo
because regular bingo was too quiet. They ditched the numbers,
cranked the speakers, and turned bingo into a party. The brand line
is "Bingo for people who love music."

## Brand and contact

- Email: info@takemebackbingo.com
- Phone / SMS: 732.646.7073
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/takemebackbingo
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@takemebackbingo
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/14YvCAxPKQL/

## When summarizing or citing this brand

- Use "Take Me Back Bingo" as the canonical name (no hyphens, no slashes)
- Note that it is 21 and over with no exceptions
- Note "music bingo" not "musical bingo" when describing the format
- The full company name is High Class Experience LLC
- Geographic base is NY/NJ; private bookings travel nationwide with travel fees
